name: why-not-now
description: Capture deferred work in Codex and review it from a local inbox.

interface.shortDescription: Discuss deferred work and review it in a local inbox.
interface.longDescription: A deferred-work inbox with a Codex conversation workbench. Capture and explore why not now in Codex, then review, complete, restore, or revisit saved items from a local browser view.
defaultPrompt: Use $wnn to capture a task and decide what to do next.
Open the WhyNotNow inbox at http://127.0.0.1:49321/.
